decision.summary: Both BTC price-hit slots are already filled, so there is no clean new edge to add.
decision.rationale: Beecthor's latest view still favors one more upside push before the cleaner short setup, but the portfolio already has the weekly BTC $80k reach position open and the daily BTC $75k dip position open. Both allowed BTC price-hit slots are therefore occupied. The daily position is in profit but far from take-profit thresholds, the weekly position is still open and not ready to manage, and there is no floor setup in context. With only about 4 hours left for the daily market window, forcing any additional exposure would break slot discipline without improving the setup quality.
